items.title: Evert to miss Wimbledon amid cancer recurrence
items.summary: Tennis Hall of Famer Chris Evert said Thursday her ovarian cancer has returned and treatment will prevent her from attending Wimbledon this year.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: England dig deep after Latham, Conway dominate with 317-run stand
items.summary: Four late wickets, including both centurions, allow Stokes' men some breathing space on sweltering day
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Sources: Putellas reaches deal with Lionesses
items.summary: Ballon d'Or winner Alexia Putellas has reached an agreement with London City Lionesses, multiple sources confirmed to ESPN, after leaving Barcelona following a 14-year spell.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
